SEARCH
Package model.items.equipments

Schnittstelle Equippable

Alle bekannten Implementierungsklassen:
Accessory, Armor, Headwear, Weapon
public interface Equippable
Represents an item that can be equipped by the player.

Implementing classes define which equipment slot they belong to.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    EquipmentSlot
    getSlot()
    Returns the equipment slot associated with this item.

  • Methodendetails

    • getSlot

      EquipmentSlot getSlot()
      Returns the equipment slot associated with this item.
      Gibt zurück:
      the EquipmentSlot this item can be equipped in
